frontmatter.title: Phoenix vs Griffin Volcanic Sky Battle TEST
frontmatter.description: A surreal volcanic sky realm where islands of black rock float above rivers of molten lava flowing through the air like suspended waterfalls. The sky burns with deep crimson clouds illuminated by lightning storms.
frontmatter.author: LudovicCreator

body: A surreal volcanic sky realm where islands of black rock float above rivers of molten lava flowing through the air like suspended waterfalls. The sky burns with deep crimson clouds illuminated by lightning storms.
